t: His [rec]ompense by judgments of […] His compassion with the gl[orious] honor of […] His [s]easons
[and] all the blessings of [His] peace [… the gl]ory of His works, and in the ligh[t of …] and with the splendor of
the praise given Him in all the firmam[ents of …] light and darkness and the figures of […] the glorious [ho]liness of the King
for all [His] veritable works […] for the angels of knowledge in all [their] king[doms …] His [cam]p, holy exaltations
for His glorious thrones and the footstool of [His] f[eet and all] His majestic [ch]ariots and [His] ho[ly] inner sanctums […] and for the portals of [the Kin]g’s entrance,
together with all the exits of [… the cor]ners of its str[uc]ture and all the […] for His glorious temples and the firmaments of […]
